command: cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && echo '=== AGENT SPECS ===' && for agent in sakura remy megabyte larry sentinel; do echo "--- $agent SOUL head ---"; head -20 agents/$agent/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null; echo; done && echo '=== RELATIONSHIPS ===' && head -30 agents/sakura/RELATIONSHIPS.md 2>/dev/null && echo '=== GOVERNING PRINCIPLES ===' && grep -A 3 'Principle\|Single Shared\|Agents Experience\|Interfaces Are\|Presence Is\|Fabrication' docs/architectural-alignment-directive.md | head -40
